[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100000 1
1 00100001 2
2 00000001 1
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00101000 2
7 10010000 2

01 10 00011000 2
12 21 10001000 2
23 32 10001000 2
34 43 10100000 2
45 54 00100000 1 match 0
56 65 00100001 2 match 1
67 76 00000001 1 match 2
70 07 00000000 a match 3 4 5

02 20 00001000 1
13 31 10001010 3
24 42 10000000 1
35 53 00100000 1 match 0
46 64 00100000 1 match 0
57 75 00000101 2
60 06 00100000 1 match 0
71 17 10000000 1

03 30 00101000 2 match 6
14 41 10010000 2 match 7
25 52 00000100 1
36 63 00100010 2
47 74 10000000 1
50 05 00100000 1 match 0
61 16 00000010 1
72 27 10000100 2

04 40 00110000 2
15 51 00000000 a match 3 4 5
26 62 00000000 a match 3 4 5
37 73 10000000 1
